site.title: International Accessibility Task Force
site.tagline: Daga haaje heɓugo nastugo yahugo repoji ummatore
nav.label: Aranndejum
meta.home.description: IATF ɗon wayla haaje je ɗon mari jaɓɓorɗe je ɓe footi heɓa.
meta.projects.description: Browse kujeji je yimɓe footi heba gal IATF.
meta.propose.description: Ɗaɓɓa taskaram jaɓɓol gal IATF gal Web, e-mail, mala Discord.
meta.governance.description: Janngin no IATF jaɓata kujeji, ɗon aynina taskaramji, e ɗon mari kuɗe je yimɓe footi yi'a.
meta.join.description: Ways to take part in IATF: hokku code, fassira, foondi, mala aynugo taskaram.
meta.accessibility.description: Bana noy IATF yiɗi aynugo jaɓɓorde ndu be no ɗum wi'ata jaɓɓorɗe je ɗum heɓata.
meta.transparency.description: Defte IATF je ummaatoore: dawolji, taskaramji, be jaangirdeji je ɗon maɓɓita bana no ɗum wi'i.
registry.empty.title: Wala kujeji winndaama fahin
registry.empty.body: IATF ɗon sirya kujeji maɓɓe arandeji.
proposal.form.title: Lollinugo ɗaɓɓitol
proposal.form.body: Wurtin foorme je ɗo'o ngam nelugo torra ha IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: Javascript ɗon mari haaje ngam huwugo web form ndu. To a heɓataako, huwuki e-mail mala Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Jaɓɓorgo Daande Baɗowal eɓɓoore eɓɓataako nder nokkuure nde'e. Formule ndu maɓɓitoto jaɓɓorgal e-mail maaɗa.
proposal.form.ready: Jaɓɓorgo Keɓaama. To a neldi tornde, IATF wurtinay limtol jaɓɓol.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Lestin lartol aynol spam hiddeko a nelda.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Jaɓɓorgo Spam timmi. A jaɓɓo fahin hiddeko a nelda.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Jaɓɓorgo Ganndal Spam fotaama tabbitinki jooni. Ɗaɓɓa fahin.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Jaɓɓorgo Spam timmi. Aɗa foonda fahin.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Jaɓɓorgo Kewuuji ɗi a yiɗi hiddeko a nelda.
proposal.form.success: Mbarji'on. Njaafol mon jaɓama e ɗum ɗon nder suudu ngam foondol.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: To on wurtini IATF fahin ngam doololol ndu, hawti ha les ɗo'o.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Goɗol feere waɗi nde a neldi ɗaɓɓitol ngol. A foonda fahin. To caɗeele ɗon tokki, naftir e-mail.
project.detail.problemTitle: Ko woni caɗeele je kuugal ndu larni
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Fuɗɗoode nder ɗemngal Engele, fassirɗe footi ɓesda ha ɓaawo
footer.label: Jaɓɓorgo Daande Baɗowal
footer.blurb: Kuugal heɓugo nastugo hauti be fudda fuɗɗugo, fudda wurtinugo, e fudda surugo.
footer.source: Lartol dabareji jaɓɓol: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Kujeji je huwoɓe kujeji wallugo.
contact.label: Wurtinol
translation.label: Darnde fassirgo
translation.source: Ɗemngal Engele woni ɗemngal fuɗɗam ɗerewol ndu.
translation.humanReviewed: Furtol ngol ɗon laaraama diga wolwoowo je mari dabare.
translation.machineAssisted: Ɗemngal ngal ɗum walliinde masin e ɗum meeɗaayi waɗugo jaɓɓol ngol bee wolwoowo wolwugo boɗɗum. Jaɓɓolji ɗon jaɓɓa gal GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Furtol ndu ɗon laara ha ɓaawo jaangirde ɗemngal Engele'en je ragare e footi haani laarugo.
